title: Setting up Obsidian Git Plugin for iCloud Sync
first_prompt:
I'm trying to figure out how to set up the Git plugin for Obsidian on my Macbook Pro. Here's the documentation page. Can you read it an explain to me the options if I'm using iCloud sync?

https://pub
summary: Irwin was attempting to figure out the technical process of setting up the Obsidian Git plugin on his MacBook Pro while maintaining reliable synchronization through iCloud. The assistant proposed creating an external Git directory, specifically `~/Documents/ObsidianGit`, and using a symlink to bypass potential conflicts caused by iCloud's file
